# Vendored DACTAL

Source: https://dactal.org (`dactal.js`, `dactal_utils.js`,
`dactal_storage_indexeddb.js`), fetched 2026-06-18.

These are pinned, unmodified copies. To update, re-fetch from dactal.org and
diff — the files are dependency-free browser scripts with no build step.

## License — UNRESOLVED

No license is stated in the files or on dactal.org. **Do not ship a distributed
build until licensing is confirmed with the author.** Until then this is fine for
local/dev use only. See `docs/dev/dactal.md`.
